macro.title: E.l.f. Beauty to walk back some tariff price increases amid high gas prices and consumer 'suffering' - CNBC
macro.summary: E.l.f. Beauty raised prices by $1 last August to offset the impact of tariffs. It's now planning to walk back some of that back amid a consumer pullback.

macro.title: OpenAI takes the lead in AI IPO horse race: 'Getting to public markets first is very important' - CNBC
macro.summary: It comes after reports that the AI giant and ChatGPT owner is set to file confidentially for an IPO as soon as this week.

macro.title: Ram Revives the Muscle Truck With 3 New Rumble Bee Models, Including a 777-HP Hellcat Version - Road & Track
macro.summary: Ram hopes to see street performance pickups truly capture the mainstream for the first time with the Rumble Bee, Rumble Bee 392, and Rumble Bee SRT.

macro.title: Bond prices are down, yields are up and investors are on edge. Here's what that means for the economy. - CBS News
macro.summary: U.S. government bonds are sagging as investors fret that hotter inflation will keep interest rate cuts on hold.

macro.title: Penn Station Update: Trump’s Transportation Secretary Sean P. Duffy & Amtrak Announce Penn Transformation Partners (Halmar) as Master Developer Team for New York Penn Station Renovation - Amtrak Media
